ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subprojects" (
  "subproject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subproject */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the subproject belongs to */,
  "subproject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subproject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subproject */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subproject */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subproject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the subproject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subproject was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the subproject */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subproject was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subproject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subprojects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "subproject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subproject the deployment belongs to */,
  "deployment_name" TEXT /* Name of the deployment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied during the deployment */,
  "deployment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the deployment */,
  "deployment_end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the deployment */,
  "location_lat" REAL /* Actual latitude of the deployment location */,
  "location_lon" REAL /* Actual longitude of the deployment location */,
  "fuzzed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the location data is fuzzed for privacy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the deployment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_subproject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subproject_id") REFERENCES subprojects ("subproject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the treatment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "deployment_id" TEXT /* ID of the deployment the observation belongs to */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sequence of the observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species observed */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the observed species */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the observed species */,
  "individual_id" TEXT /* Individual identifier for the observed species */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals observed */,
  "begin_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the observation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the observation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the observation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the species record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the species record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_researchers" (
  "deployment_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment-researcher link */,
  "deployment_id" TEXT /* ID of the deployment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the deployment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the link */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_researchers_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "deployment_id" TEXT /* ID of the deployment being accessed */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-researcher link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the link */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subproject_researchers" (
  "subproject_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subproject-researcher link */,
  "subproject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subproject */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the subproject */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the link */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subproject_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subproject_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subproject_researchers_subproject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subproject_id") REFERENCES subprojects ("subproject_id")
)
